author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone    Tomorrow is the 426LIVE day!    

We have a jam-packed schedule filled with press panels, music sessions, intergalactic alpha and, of course, product releases.

It's a monumental time in Star Atlas history and by attending, you're creating it with us! 

The schedule:
 
9:00 AM PDT / 4:00 PM UTC - Community Press Event
9:30 AM PDT / 4:30 PM UTC - Music Session by the Ape Rave Club
10:00 AM PDT / 5:00 PM UTC - 426LIVE EVENT KICK-OFF

We hope you're as excited as we are. See you all tomorrow! 


And yes, if you register and share the event you get a chance to win your own Star Atlas T-shirt: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/426live-iykyk-by-star-atlas-tickets-384348686267

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/997759294281887775
